title: auth/DoA/doa-notification-creation.spec.ts:65 › Delegated Organisation - Notification Creation › Carol Clark (agent) creates for Plant Org 1 → changes organisation to Plant Agency C before submitting

actor.agent: Carol Clark (DoA agent, auth b2cDoaAgent / role b2c_doa_agent, own org 'IPAFFS Plant Agency C')
actor.delegatedOrg: IPAFFS Plant Organisation 1 (member: Isabel Irwin, auth b2cOrg1)
actor.note: confirmed identities from trace title + spec; agent/org relationship inferred from sibling DoA specs and users.ts (config/users.ts:79 getB2CDoaAgent, config/auth-files.ts:20-21)

trace_capture_note: This trace was captured WITHOUT DOM snapshots (0 snapshot events in *.trace) and with 0 attachments, so no accessibility-tree renders were available. Field/copy evidence is drawn from the ordered action timeline (confirmed: real accessible names + values that Playwright resolved against the live DOM) and cross-checked against the IPAFFS QA page-object + workflow source (inferred/legacy).
newSurface: This DoA CHED-PP trace exercises the delegated-agent surface the standard (non-DoA) journey never renders: (1) an ORGANISATION-SELECTION page inserted immediately after the import-type page, only shown to agents who hold delegated authority; (2) a change-organisation-before-submit flow reached from the review page; and (3) the responsible-organisation identity carried onto the review/confirmation. Standard non-agent CHED-PP journeys skip the organisation-selection page entirely (workflow only visits it when organisationName or useOwnOrganisation is set — ched-pp-workflows.ts:260-264). Sibling tests in the same suite additionally surface a 'Trade Partner' dashboard badge and auto-population of the responsible contact + importer from the delegated org (captured below under authorizationRules / autoPopulation as related-but-not-rendered-in-THIS-trace).

organisationSelectionPage.position: Rendered immediately after the import-type page ('Plants, plant products and...') and before country-of-origin — ONLY for delegated agents.

options_inferred: (implied sibling option for the agent's own organisation — selecting the agent's own org radio is modelled as radioOwnOrganisation = 'IPAFFS Plant Agency C', page-objects/notification/OrganisationSelectionPage.ts:18-20)
step1_whoseOrg.evidence: confirmed: action 'Check getByRole(radio,{name:A different organisation})' pw:api@26, trace 851759a...; page object OrganisationSelectionPage.ts:6-8

step2_pickOrg.control: radio group listing the specific delegated organisations the agent is authorised to act for
step2_pickOrg.evidence: confirmed: action 'Check getByRole(radio,{name:IPAFFS Plant Organisation 1})' then 'Save and continue', trace 851759a...; radioCompany(companyName) OrganisationSelectionPage.ts:14-16
step2_pickOrg.note: Only appears after 'A different organisation' is chosen (selectDifferentOrganisation checks the different-org radio, Save and continue, then checks the named-company radio — OrganisationSelectionPage.ts:36-41).

buttons: Save and review (confirmed — used on the change-org-before-submit path, OrganisationSelectionPage.ts:22-24,31-34)

changeOrganisationBeforeSubmit.flow: Amend (btnAmend) → click #organisation-change-link → organisation-selection page → select own org radio 'IPAFFS Plant Agency C' → 'Save and review' → back to review → 'Save and continue' → declaration → submit
changeOrganisationBeforeSubmit.result: The responsible/owning organisation on the SUBMITTED notification becomes the newly-chosen org (Plant Agency C), overriding the Plant Org 1 chosen during draft creation.
changeOrganisationBeforeSubmit.evidence: confirmed: actions 89-95 (Amend, #organisation-change-link, radio 'IPAFFS Plant Agency C', 'Save and review', 'Save and continue', checkbox 'I/We have read and understood', 'Submit notification'), trace 851759a...; ReviewNotificationPage.ts:14-16,125-127; OrganisationSelectionPage.ts:31-34

fields.note: This trace walks the full CHED-PP creation journey with the workflow defaults (ched-pp-workflows.ts DEFAULT_CONFIG). Non-DoA field detail is standard CHED-PP and covered by the main run; recorded here only where the action timeline confirms a concrete value.

consignment-country-of-origin.control: Country of origin dropdown; value = ROW default 'Afghanistan' (singleCommodity config leaves isEu default true here, but workflow default euCountryOfOrigin=France — see note)
consignment-country-of-origin.evidence: confirmed 'Select option getByLabel(Country of origin)' action 14; value not surfaced in accessible name

transport-details.evidence: confirmed actions 39-48, trace 851759a...; legacy default values ched-pp-workflows.ts:161-165

contact-details.action: Save and continue only — no manual entry (contact pre-populated for the delegated org)
contact-details.evidence: confirmed action 53 (Save and continue with no field fills preceding); auto-population asserted by sibling test doa-notification-creation.spec.ts:113-140

accompanying-documents.evidence: confirmed actions 55-62, trace 851759a...; legacy defaults ched-pp-workflows.ts:171-177

consignor-creation.name: Linus George Ltd
consignor-creation.evidence: confirmed actions 66-74, trace 851759a...; legacy defaults ched-pp-workflows.ts:178-188

autoPopulation.description: For agent-created-for-delegated-org notifications the responsible contact and importer are auto-filled from the delegated organisation (Plant Org 1) — the agent does NOT enter them. Asserted in sibling test doa-notification-creation.spec.ts:113-140, NOT rendered in this specific trace but part of the same DoA surface.

reviewValues_legacy.importer: IPAFFS Plant Organisation 1 — KAINOS SOFTWARE LTD, 4-6, UPPER CRESCENT, BELFAST, BT7 1NT (#importer)

authorizationRules: An agent holding delegated authority sees an organisation-selection page after import-type; a non-delegated user does not (the org-selection page is skipped) — confirmed this trace renders it; inferred the negative from workflow ched-pp-workflows.ts:259-264.

An agent may create a notification FOR a delegated organisation (Plant Org 1) OR for their OWN organisation (Plant Agency C); the chosen organisation becomes the responsible/owning organisation on the submitted notification (#responsible-organisation-name) — confirmed this trace: created-for Plant Org 1, changed to Plant Agency C before submit, final owner = Plant Agency C (action 104 expects #responsible-organisation-name toContainText 'IPAFFS Plant Agency C').
An agent may change the responsible organisation at review time (before submit) via #organisation-change-link → re-run org-selection → Save and review — confirmed this trace (actions 89-92).

When an agent SUBMITS for a delegated org (Plant Org 1), a member of that org (Isabel Irwin) CAN view, copy-as-new and amend it — legacy: doa-agent-access.spec.ts:7-31 / doa-importer-access.spec.ts:7-31.
When an agent submits for their OWN org (Plant Agency C), a member of Plant Org 1 CANNOT see it — legacy: doa-agent-access.spec.ts:60-86.
An agent's DRAFT for a delegated org (not yet submitted) is NOT visible to that org's members; it becomes visible to them only once submitted — legacy: doa-importer-access.spec.ts:34-58.
An agent can always view/copy/amend notifications she created on her OWN dashboard, regardless of owning org — legacy: doa-agent-access.spec.ts:34-58.
Members of the same organisation can see each other's submitted notifications (Franklyn D & David D in Plant Org Test) — legacy: doa-importer-access.spec.ts:60-84.

Agent-created-for-delegated-org notifications carry a 'Trade Partner' badge in the dashboard status column (#status-0) alongside the 'New' status — legacy: doa-notification-creation.spec.ts:57-58; NotificationDashboardPage.getNotificationStatus #notifications-page #status-0, NotificationDashboardPage.ts:224-226.

relatedDashboardSurface.tradePartnerBadge: #notifications-page #status-0 contains both 'New' and 'Trade Partner' for agent-created-for-delegated-org notifications (doa-notification-creation.spec.ts:55-58)
relatedDashboardSurface.manageTradePartnersLink: getByRole('link',{name:'Manage trade partners'}) (NotificationDashboardPage.ts:28-30) — DoA management entry point

notes: kind=creation (from doa-notification-creation.spec.ts) but the load-bearing value is the delegated-agent surface: organisation-selection page + change-organisation-before-submit + responsible-organisation identity, plus the sibling-test authorization/visibility rules and the 'Trade Partner' dashboard badge. No DOM snapshots were captured in this trace, so page-level field/copy detail is corroborated from the QA page-object + workflow source rather than rendered a11y trees. Discrepancy watch: workflow config default isEu=true→euCountryOfOrigin=France, but the trace passed only {organisationName, singleCommodity, stopAtReview}, so country-of-origin used the France default even though the dropdown value was not exposed in the action's accessible name.
